subject: Science
chapter: Nature of Matter: Elements, Compounds, and Mixtures

activities_projects.title: Identifying Uniform and Non-Uniform Mixtures
activities_projects.objective: To differentiate between uniform and non-uniform mixtures
steps: Prepare a mixture of salt and water in a beaker
Prepare another mixture of sand and water
Observe whether the components can be seen separately
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the difference between uniform and non-uniform mixtures

activities_projects.title: Separation of Salt from Salt Water
activities_projects.objective: To demonstrate separation of mixture by evaporation
steps: Pour salt solution into an evaporating dish
Observe the salt crystals left behind
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that components of mixtures can be separated by physical methods

activities_projects.title: Testing Properties of Elements
activities_projects.objective: To observe properties of different elements
steps: Observe the color and texture of iron and sulfur
Bring a magnet near the iron
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand that elements have unique properties

activities_projects.title: Identifying Compounds in Everyday Life
activities_projects.objective: To identify compounds present in daily life
steps: List common substances found at home
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognize compounds and their chemical composition

activities_projects.title: Air as a Mixture Investigation
activities_projects.objective: To understand that air is a mixture of gases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn that air is a mixture and occupies space

activities_projects.title: Observation of Alloy Materials
activities_projects.objective: To study alloys as mixtures of metals
steps: Observe common metal objects at home
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about alloys as uniform mixtures

activities_projects.title: Classifying Substances as Pure or Mixture
activities_projects.objective: To differentiate between pure substances and mixtures
steps: Classify as pure substance or mixture
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn the concept of pure substances

activities_projects.title: Observing Mineral Samples
activities_projects.objective: To understand minerals as natural compounds
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand that minerals have fixed composition

activities_projects.title: Identifying Elements in Everyday Materials
activities_projects.objective: To identify elements used in daily life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about practical uses of elements

activities_projects.title: Comparing Mixtures and Compounds
activities_projects.objective: To analyze differences between mixtures and compounds
steps: Observe the mixture of iron and sulfur
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand differences in properties between mixtures and compounds
